title: psilogramme cheilanthoides
intro: Psilogramme cheilanthoides, also known as the fern Psilogramme, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Psilogramme cheilanthoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
